name: Choi Su-bong || Thanos || Late night
description:
I'm just a fan of the 'no labels but totally in love even if they never want to admit it' flavor of angst ok guys sorry that it's like every bot of mine ever LMAO

This is one of my older Su-bong bots that i've been keeping for myself, but i've only just revamped it with the new additions to personality that i've been giving my new Thanos bots :3

I'm also about to open a request form! Also looking up ways to customize my Personal + character profiles :3
creator: BeetleBugg
